paper_title: SHE: Stepwise Hybrid Examination Reinforcement Learning Framework for E-commerce Search Relevance

key_components: Hybrid reward model combining generative stepwise reward model and human-annotated offline verifier
Prioritization of learning from critical correct and incorrect reasoning steps
incorporated_techniques: Diversified data filtering to encourage exploration across varied reasoning paths and mitigate policy entropy collapse
Multi-stage curriculum learning to foster progressive capability growth
advantages: Improves reasoning quality and relevance-prediction accuracy in large-scale e-commerce settings
Outperforms SFT, DPO, GRPO, and other baselines

metadata.conference: Make sure to enter the correct conference title from your rights confirmation email; Oct, 2025

figure_1_description: TaoSR-SHE integrates several key techniques for advanced reinforcement learning: (A) difficulty sampling, (B) diverse sampling, (C) generative stepwise reward training, and (D) stepwise hybrid examination in reinforcement learning

results.research_focus: E-commerce search relevance evaluation using Large Language Models with Chain-of-Thought reasoning
challenges_addressed: Overfitting in SFT and DPO methods
Poor generalization on complex or out-of-distribution queries
Sparse rewards in RLVR leading to inefficient credit assignment and reward hacking

title: SHE: Stepwise Hybrid Examination Reinforcement Learning Framework for E-commerce Search Relevance
